iti34:1.3: "Anātāpī, bhikkhave, bhikkhu anottāpī abhabbo sambodhāya, abhabbo nibbānāya, abhabbo anuttarassa yogakkhemassa adhigamāya. Ātāpī ca kho, bhikkhave, bhikkhu ottāpī bhabbo sambodhāya, bhabbo nibbānāya, bhabbo anuttarassa yogakkhemassa adhigamāyā"ti. Etamatthaṁ bhagavā avoca. Tatthetaṁ iti vuccati:
iti34:1.5:
Yo ca satimā nipako jhāyī,
Ātāpī ottāpī ca appamatto;
Saṁyojanaṁ jātijarāya chetvā,
Idheva sambodhimanuttaraṁ phuse"ti.
iti34:1.6:
Ayampi attho vutto bhagavatā, iti me sutanti.
Sattamaṁ.
